description: HTTP 401 use_dpop_nonce error (RFC 9449 Section 8). The server rejects the request and supplies a nonce via the DPoP-Nonce response header; the client MUST retry with that nonce included in the proof's nonce claim.

headers.WWW-Authenticate: DPoP error="use_dpop_nonce", error_description="Authorization server requires nonce in DPoP proof"

body.error_description: Authorization server requires nonce in DPoP proof
